title: OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides breast and cervical cancer screenings and/or diagnostics through a network of providers. Helps reduce cancer burden through early detection, risk screening, education, and linkage to medical treatment. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Age 18-39 and needing breast or cervical cancer diagnostic services (determined by clinician) -Age 40 or older needing breast or cervical cancer screening and/or diagnostic services -Must live or intend to live in Oregon - Household income at or below 250% Federal Poverty Level (FPL) -Must be uninsured or have insurance but not enough to cover their needs Men of any age with symptoms of breast cancer are eligible for breast and genetic services. United States citizenship is not required to participate in the ScreenWise program. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (971) 673-0581 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 673-1222 Main phone (971) 673-1299 FAX 711 TTY/TTD (800) 422-6012 Toll-free ScreenWise Main Administration (971) 673-0581 Patient Assistance Line (877) 255-7070 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Administrative Entities * Breast Cancer Administrative Entities * Cervical Cancer Genetic Testing and Screening * Breast Cancer Genetic Testing and Screening * Cervical Cancer Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES -
